name: WhatsApp Gas Ordering - Hybrid State Machine (Complete)

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: ✅ Your session has been reset!  All previous order information has been cleared.  Reply "Hi" to start a fresh order.

assignments.name: response
response
assignments.value:
=*Welcome to Hi Service Gas*

Your reliable door-to-door LPG gas delivery service across Helderberg, Stellenbosch, Kleinmond, Betty’s Bay, Pringle Bay, Rooi Els, and surrounding areas.
Note: Some areas within listed towns may fall outside our delivery routes

*Order, pay, and schedule* your delivery in one simple process.

Important: This WhatsApp service *requires online card payment* at the time of ordering.

To get started, please enter your *4-digit street postal code* (e.g. 7140) to confirm service availability.

(Type Cancel to cancel end this chat)

*Customer Support:* 063 693 5532 | gas@hiservice.co.za

conditions.leftValue: ={{    $(`Delivery Locations List`)     .all()     .map(r => String(r.json["PO Box Code"]))     .includes(String($json['PO Box Code'])) }}

assignments.name: response
assignments.value:
=Excellent! Your area code falls within our delivery route. 🚚

Let's get you added to our system so we can process your order.

Please provide the following, 1 below the other:
1. Name and Surname
2. Street address, Suburb, City
3. Email Address

Example: 
James Elliot
31 Example Road, Strand, Cape Town
james.elliot@gmail.com

(Type Cancel to cancel end this chat)

assignments.name: response

parameters.jsCode: return $json.products.map(product => ({ json: product }));
return $json.parsed_orders.map(order => ({ json: { order } }));

assignments.name: response
response
assignments.value:
=Welcome back, {{ $json.result.customer_data.first_name }}. 

Please confirm that the details we have for you are still correct :

*Name:* {{ $json.result.customer_data.name }}
*Delivery Address:* {{ [
$json.result.customer_data.addresses?.[0]?.AddressLine1,
$json.result.customer_data.addresses?.[0]?.AddressLine2 ,
$json.result.customer_data.addresses?.[0]?.City,
$json.result.customer_data.addresses?.[0]?.PostalCode
]
  .map(v => (v ?? '').toString().trim())
  .filter(v => v.length)
  .join(', ')
}}
*Email:* {{ $json.result.customer_data.email }}

Reply with:
Y - Yes, details are correct
N - No, details are incorrect

(Type Cancel to cancel end this chat)

assignments.name: response
assignments.value:
=Welcome to Hi Service Gas, {{ $json.Contacts[0].FirstName }}

You are currently loaded on our system but your status is ARCHIVED.

Your status will need to be changed to ACTIVE to order here. Unforunately, this can only be done by our admin team. 

You can contact them at 063 693 5532 or admin@hiservice.co.za.

Alternatively, you could try again from a different phone number.

Hope to have you back and ACTIVE soon! 🙂

assignments.name: response
assignments.value:
=Your address has been updated on our system.

Your new delivery address is:

*Delivery Address:* {{
[
  $json.Addresses?.[1]?.AddressLine1,
  $json.Addresses?.[1]?.AddressLine2,
  $json.Addresses?.[1]?.City,
  $json.Addresses?.[1]?.PostalCode
]
  .map(v => (v ?? '').toString().trim())
  .filter(v => v.length)
  .join(', ')
}}

Reply with:
Y - Yes, details are correct
N - No, details are incorrect

(Type Cancel to cancel end this chat)

assignments.name: response
response
assignments.value:
=Let's update your details on our system so we can process your order.

Please provide the following, 1 below the other:
1. Name and Surname
2. Street address, Suburb, City, Street/Postal code
3. Email Address

*Example:*
James Elliot
31 Example Street, Strand, Cape Town, 7140
james.elliot@gmail.com

*Or reply with:*
R - Recheck your current address

(Type Cancel to cancel end this chat)

assignments.name: response
assignments.value:
=Your postal code sadly falls outside our current delivery route. 😢

We have noted your contact number and postal code. If we expand to your area in the future, we will let you know.

nodes.name: Get Tenant ID (no need to connect

assignments.name: response
assignments.value:
The letter you entered does not match any available slots.

Type a date to find the closest available slots.

*Example:*
25/01/2026

value.order_summary_json: ={{JSON.stringify($json.result.last_order.products.map(p => ({ ItemCode: p.code, Description: p.description || p.name, Quantity: p.quantity, UnitAmount: p.unit_price, LineAmount: p.line_total, TaxType: "OUTPUT3", AccountCode: "200" }))) }}
value.invoice_lineitems_json: ={{JSON.stringify($json.result.last_order.products.map(p => ({ ItemCode: p.code, Description: p.description || p.name, Quantity: p.quantity, UnitAmount: p.unit_price, LineAmount: p.line_total, TaxType: "OUTPUT3", AccountCode: "200" }))) }}
